rationale: Foreign corporation's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key family as CORP_MBCA-12, LLC_MLLC-12, FICT-4 (foreign-entity-name convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its incorporation is
rationale: Home state or country of incorporation. Same key as CORP_MBCA-12.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date on which it was authorized to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the foreign corporation received Maine authority (a different concept from formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction; this is the Maine-specific qualification anniversary).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The type of other entity to which the foreign business corporation has been converted is ____
rationale: First-line trailing blank in FOURTH for the new entity type (e.g., 'limited liability company', 'nonprofit'). Optional — FOURTH is a conditional block triggered by withdrawal-upon-conversion.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ____ (continuation of new entity type, narrow blank starting line 2)
rationale: Narrow second-line blank (~63pt wide) at the start of FOURTH's wrapped line 2; receives any overflow from 12b4 for the new-entity-type value. Same canonical key as 12b4 — synth/filler can repeat or split.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: and the jurisdiction whose laws govern its internal affairs is ____
rationale: Right-side trailing blank on FOURTH's line 2 for the governing jurisdiction of the converted entity. Optional, paired with 12b4/12b5.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The mailing address to which the Secretary of State may mail a copy of any process served on the Secretary of State: ____ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single full-width line for the mailing address used for service of process during the withdrawal period (FIFTH). The '(street, city, state and zip code)' parenthetical below the line is a label for this widget, not a separate widget.

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature of duly authorized officer) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget. Shape D (matches CORP_MBCA-11, CORP_MBCA-12, LLC_MLLC-12). The (signature) line above is wet-ink only with no widget.

rationale: Total fees ($90 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
